series_metadata.series_title: Credit Unions Research Memorandum - Non Legal
series_metadata.series_description: These records include all research projects conducted either internally or externally as they related to statutory requirements and internal operations of the Division of Financial Institutions.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness ; Electronic: electronic files no longer of administrative value
